title: Parent graph-metadata.json derived.last_active_child_id is null, violating REQ-P-002
scopeProof: Single occurrence at line 220. parent spec REQ-P-002 explicitly requires it be set to a child ID.
recommendation: Set derived.last_active_child_id to 001-initial-doctor-commands (most recently saved child).

title: Parent spec.md Phase Map claims child 001 is Complete but child's own docs show incomplete
scopeProof: Four independent child docs (implementation-summary, checklist, tasks, plan) confirm incomplete status. Parent claim is sole outlier.
recommendation: Update parent spec.md:104 to reflect actual status. Resolve implementation-summary internal frontmatter-vs-body contradiction first.

title: Implementation-summary claims ~30% complete but all implementation files exist on disk
scopeProof: Glob confirms all 5 MD, 5 YAML, and migration-manifest.json exist on disk. implementation-summary describes these files as remaining work.
recommendation: Update implementation-summary to reflect actual file authorship status (~80%+). Advance completion_pct and update Remaining Work sections.

title: tasks.md shows all Phase B/C/D tasks as Pending but implementation files exist
scopeProof: 16+ tasks in Phase B/C/D all show Pending. Every task whose output file was verified on disk is incorrectly marked.
recommendation: Mark T-011..T-046 with actual completion status (Done for files authored, In progress for pending verification).

title: Parent spec.md Phase Map claims 21 yamls but ADR-010 reduces to 1 YAML per command (5 total)
scopeProof: On-disk reality: 5 new YAML files, not 21. ADR-010 explicitly supersedes the multi-mode design.
recommendation: Update parent spec.md:105 deliverable count from 21 yamls to 5 yamls.

title: Implementation-summary Track B1 describes obsolete multi-mode YAMLs as remaining work (ADR-010 violation)
scopeProof: ADR-010: one interactive YAML per command. implementation-summary still describes confirm/apply/apply-confirm variants as pending.
recommendation: Remove the 3 obsolete YAML entries from Track B1 completion description.

title: memory.md validate_document.py reports 2 non-sequential-numbering warnings — ambiguous REQ-001 compliance
scopeProof: Output: VALID, total_issues: 2 (warnings only). REQ-001 says total_issues: 0. Ambiguous whether warnings count.
recommendation: Fix section numbering (0→1, 6→2) or clarify that issues = errors only.

title: Parent REQ-P-001 acceptance criterion conflicts with framework-allowed cross-cutting optional docs
scopeProof: AC says exactly the three lean-trio files but parent has 5 files (handover.md + resource-map.md are framework-allowed). Intent satisfied (no heavy docs).
recommendation: Update AC to exclude cross-cutting optional docs or rephrase to 'no heavy docs at parent level.'

evidence: All implementation files exist for spec'd deliverables, but tasks.md and implementation-summary are stale.
All CHK-001..CHK-806 remain unchecked [ ]. No verification evidence recorded.
Commands exist at .opencode/commands/doctor/ matching system-spec-kit skill surface. No routing violations.

notes: Parent lean trio present. graph-metadata.json last_active_child_id null. handover.md + resource-map.md are cross-cutting optional docs, not heavy docs. Phase map has stale status and deliverable counts.

All implementation files exist on disk (5 MD + 5 YAML + manifest). Doc layer is stale: tasks.md shows all B/C/D pending, checklist.md has all items unchecked, implementation-summary claims ~30% when files are ~80%+ authored. ADR-010 (mode reduction) not reflected in implementation-summary.
